title: Create Account
subtitle: Choose a method to create your account

linkSent.title: Check your email
linkSent.message: We sent a sign-in link to your email address. Click the link to complete your account.

errors.INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address
errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_IN_USE: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
errors.POPUP_CLOSED: Sign-in popup was closed. Please try again.
errors.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.UNKNOWN: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
